desc: DONE: audited upstream asahi-installer c53d66dc7193 and installer-data 072a48f02bc8. Corrected the stale premise: step2 already uses kmutil --raw --entry-point 2048 --lowest-virtual-address 0. Real gaps are j614sap/0x6040 expert-only admission, atomic install/repair/upgrade semantics for a complete kernel+DTB+initramfs object (legacy STACKBOT variable extraction fails/discards payload), and macOS 26 AEA BaseSystem plus moved/extended WiFi/BT layouts. J614s multitouch collection already works generically. Documented fixture hashes, validation gates, and five-part upstream patch split. No external post, APFS, Boot Policy, enrollment, or rig access. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-asahi-installer-requirements.md.
author: claude
